title: Expense Reimbursement Process and Submission Deadlines
text:
Q: What is the process for submitting expense reimbursements and what are the deadlines?
A: To submit an expense reimbursement, employees must complete the Expense Reimbursement Form available on the company intranet. All receipts must be attached to the form, and expenses should be categorized according to the company’s expense policy. Submissions must be made within 30 days of the expense date to ensure timely processing. Once submitted, reimbursements are typically processed within two pay cycles. If you have any questions or require assistance, please contact the Finance Department at finance@company.com. Remember to keep a copy of your submission for your records. Late submissions may not be reimbursed, so it’s important to adhere to these deadlines.
